title: Build a simple Rust key-value store REST API
description: Create a Rust REST API using axum that implements an in-memory key-value store. Endpoints: GET /health, GET /entries (list all), POST /entries {key, value} (create, returns 201 + Entry), GET /entries/:id (get by id, 404 if missing), DELETE /entries/:id (delete, 204 on success), GET /entries/by-key/:key (lookup by key name). Use Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, Entry>>> for storage. Each Entry has: id (UUID v4), key (String), value (String), created_at (ISO 8601). Include unit tests for all endpoints using tower::ServiceExt::oneshot. Confirm with: cargo check && cargo test
